headline: Does Cobenfy Have the Potential to Become a Top Drug for BMY?

headline: 1 Healthcare Stock on Our Watchlist and 2 We Avoid
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. Those leading the charge have not only realized strong financial performance but also propelled the broader industry’s returns as healthcare stocks have gained 2.3% over the past six months. This was a good place to be as the S&P 500 tumbled by 1.8%.

headline: Amneal Launches Bimatoprost Ophthalmic Solution, 0.01%
summary: Important ophthalmic treatment expected to be an important growth driver for Amneal’s Affordable Medicines segmentBRIDGEWATER, N.J., April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Amneal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (“Amneal” or the “Company”) today announced the launch of bimatoprost ophthalmic solution 0.01% (2.5 mL, 5 mL and 7.5 mL). The product is the generic equivalent of LUMIGAN® (bimatoprost ophthalmic solution) 0.01%, whose design is a trademark of Allergan, Inc., an AbbVie company. Bimatoprost ophthalmic
